features: Your Skin Barrier Complex - Be kind to your skin with our lightweight Ceramide Moisturising Cream.
Our moisturiser helps soothe and strengthen the skin's natural barrier to prevent moisture loss.
Nourishes dry and sensitive skin, our cream is formulated with our skin barrier complex of 5 Ceramides, moisture-locking hyaluronic acid, hydrating Vitamin E and skin soothing Oats.
description: Product Description Be kind to your skin with our lightweight Ceramide Moisturising Cream, ideal for sensitive skin. Formulated with our skin barrier complex of 5 Ceramides, moisture-locking hyaluronic acid, hydrating Vitamin E and skin soothing Oats, our moisturiser helps soothe and strengthen the skin barrier to prevent moisture loss. Give your skin the extra care it deserves! Vegan Friendly & Fragrance Free. Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum, Stearic Acid, Ceramide NP, Avena Sativa (Oat) Kernel Extract, Ceramide NS, Ceramide NG, Ceramide AS, Ceramide EOP, Ceramide AP, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Glyceryl Stearate, PEG-100 Stearate, Triethanolamine, Phenoxyethanol, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Sodium Benzoate, Cyclohexane, Disodium EDTA, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Castor Oil Hydrogenated Ethoxylated, Butylene Glycol. Directions Use after exfoliating, cleansing & toning the skin. Apply a small amount of the moisturiser and gently massage into the skin. Do not rinse off. Safety Warning Avoid direct contact with eyes. Manufacturer Contact Information Produced for: Quest Personal Care Ltd, M27 8FF, UK. Quest Personal Care (Ireland), #154, 20 Harcourt Street, Dublin, D02 H364, Ireland. See more
